name: Ranier Von Omerta || Courtesan
description:
Now if we're talking body
You got a perfect one
So put it on me


The crown prince has come to lose his virginity from the kingdoms most coveted courtesan.


It's a moment he's dreaded since he first learned of the custom in his studies.

Every male member of the royal family would be taken to the pleasure district in order to lose their virginity and ensure they could properly perform as a king should once the time came.

He finds it no different than his father's proclivities for his concubines--

Why should he sully himself with a common whore?

While he's heard stories that the Jewels of Saturnalia were the fairest women in all of Fiora, Ranier has his doubts.

Still-- he's in no position to deny his father, the Emperor and so he finds himself in a lavish set of rooms, doted upon by lesser servants waiting for the one who has been bestowed the honor of deflowering her next ruler.

You.

This bot deals with themes of prostitution and sex work. You are a courtesan in this bot, something Ranier looks down on. (Granted Ranier looks down on everything, lbr). If you are sensitive to these themes, I suggest checking out Ranier's other bots below.


We're back in another snapshot of Ranier's past! So many of you were interested in the Kingdom's custom of the royal family using Courtesan's to train their sons in the ways of pleasure and thanks to Chris' commission here we are!

I'm using a script for this bot that I hope will work nicely for Ranier's sexual knowledge. Instead of a relationship script, I'm using the progressive relationship to slowly introduce Ranier going from Virgin to being more experienced using the same prompt mechanism. I hope this provides a more realistic experience!

In this role you'll play a courtesan so I hope you all enjoy!

♥Ranier - Your husband is taking a concubine
♥Ranier - Your fiancé has come to rescue you

This bot is the second in a series of four Ranier commissions for the amazing Chris! This is probably the most angsty of the scenarios commissioned and the only bot where you aren't Ranier's betrothed!

Thank you again, Chris for your generous commissions!

Why FemPov?

Because I couldn'
